failure_reason: The previous best still left component 37 as a separate forced identity even though it had high visual affinity to the rank04 target component 86.
improvement: The current component-graph bridge attaches the larger residual island to component 86 and improves direct, density_simple, and valid p005_area despite measurable side effects.
summary: After rank04+small combo became the base, 69 component 37 tracklets are reassigned to component 86 / gid 960000350.
title: Rank01 component bridge 37 to 86
